title: Beauty
content:
High as a star, yet lowly as a flower,
    Unknown she takes her unassuming place
    At Earth's proud masquerade--the appointed hour
    Strikes, and, behold, the marvel of her face.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Madison Julius Cawein, titled "Beauty", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
